title: Cursed Stare
description: This creature can curse you with just it's eyes... but only you?
body:
![Head Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0298028243caeb1baf7dda32a90a8940a58bae01_0.webp)

[![mado hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d134c13be5c38e90820569398ca9c692afd3e0.png)](https://www.mado-hosting.com)

# Cursed Stare

```
This horror mod was made in cooperation with Huge Deer. For comercial use, please read our license.
```  
  
### The Cursed Stare is a monster which you should avoid looking at. But are you able to avoid looking at it?  
  
This mod adds a creature which spawns at night time about every 10-20 minutes. When there is a line of sight between you and the Cursed Stare, you are forced to look at it. But be aware! You may be cursed after looking at it too much. 
  
Are you trading with villagers often? Then watch them closely, some may have been cursed...

# Config
### The config works by using the /gamerule command. Currently there are following config options:


1. cSCurseVillager - determines if the Cursed Stare can pick a random victim which will be cursed
2. configSpawnRate - Sets the spawnrate of the Cursed Stare entity (0 = never; 1 = normal; to increase the spawnrate, increase the number, same for decreasing)
